name: Delta Vector - Turn Based Racing
short_description: DELTA VECTOR is an unique turn-based racing game where physics meets strategy. Plot your moves using vector-based mechanics, master different track surfaces, and choose from 9 possible actions each turn. Race solo, challenge friends, or compete in career mode across diverse tracks and cars.
detailed_description:
Delta Vector is a unique turn-based racing indie game that combines tactical decision-making with vector-based physics. Master the art of precision racing as you calculate your every move across challenging tracks!

Core Gameplay

  • Vector-Based Movement: Each turn presents you with 9 possible moves, carefully simulating real racing physics. Your previous speed and direction affect your next move, creating a strategic "domino effect" throughout the race.

  • Tactical Decision Making: Choose between accelerating, braking, or turning - or combine these moves for advanced maneuvers. Every decision matters as your momentum carries through each turn.

  • Surface Physics: Race across different surfaces including asphalt and gravel, each affecting your car's handling and speed differently. Master the art of drifting on loose surfaces and maintaining control on tight corners.

  • Visual Feedback: Watch your car leave tire tracks, kick up gravel, and create smoke effects based on your driving style. The dynamic camera system follows the action, creating an immersive racing experience.

Game Modes

  • Time Trial: Perfect your racing line in single-player mode. Challenge yourself to complete laps with the fewest possible moves and compete for the best times.

  • PVP Racing: Challenge your friends in local races. Take turns plotting your moves as you compete head-to-head for racing supremacy.

  • Challenge Mode: Test your skills in a series of increasingly difficult scenarios. Unlock new cars and tracks as you progress through challenges.

Features

  • Diverse Track Selection: Race across multiple meticulously designed tracks, each with unique layouts and challenges. From tight technical circuits to high-speed tracks, every course offers a different racing experience.

  • Car Variety: Choose from a garage of unique vehicles, each with different handling characteristics, speeds, and acceleration profiles.

  • Visual Effects: Experience dynamic racing effects including tire smoke, exhaust effects, drift marks, and surface-specific particle systems that react to your driving style.

  • Accessible Controls: Easy to learn, hard to master - use simple mouse clicks or keyboard controls to select your moves, while the game handles the complex physics calculations.

Whether you're a casual racing fan or a hardcore strategist, Delta Vector offers a fresh take on the racing genre, combining the thoughtful planning of turn-based games with the excitement of motorsport physics!
